sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106395" key="u(drogoniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-γονικός</orth>, <pb n="1845" TEIform="pb"/> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n106395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the production of water,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σημεἱα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4080.tlg001:2:5:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
